debug_info.goal:
x : ℝ
⊢ ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..x, t * exp t = (x - 1) * exp x + 1

proof:
rw [integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt (f := fun t ↦ (t - 1) * exp t)]
  · simp
  · intro t _
    apply HasDerivAt.congr_deriv
    · apply HasDerivAt.mul
      · apply HasDerivAt.sub_const
        exact hasDerivAt_id t
      · exact hasDerivAt_exp t
    · ring
  · exact (continuous_id.mul continuous_exp).intervalIntegrable 0 x
failed_attempts:
rw [integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt (fun t ↦ (t - 1) * exp t)]
  · simp
  · intro t _
    convert ((hasDerivAt_id t).sub_const 1).mul (hasDerivAt_exp t) using 1
    ring
  · exact (continuous_id.mul continuous_exp).intervalIntegrable 0 x

have h : ∀ t, HasDerivAt (fun t ↦ (t - 1) * exp t) (t * exp t) t := by
    intro t
    convert ((hasDerivAt_id t).sub_const 1).mul (hasDerivAt_exp t) using 1
    ring
  rw [integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt (fun t _ ↦ h t) (continuous_id.mul continuous_exp).intervalIntegrable]
  simp

rw [integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt (F := fun t ↦ (t - 1) * exp t)]
  · simp
  · intro t _
    convert ((hasDerivAt_id t).sub_const 1).mul (hasDerivAt_exp t) using 1
    ring
  · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
    continuity

rw [integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt (fun t _ ↦ by
      convert HasDerivAt.mul (HasDerivAt.sub_const (hasDerivAt_id t) 1) (hasDerivAt_exp t) using 1
      ring)
    (Continuous.intervalIntegrable (by continuity) _ _)]
  simp

rw [integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt (f := fun t ↦ (t - 1) * exp t)]
  · simp
  · intro t _
    apply HasDerivAt.congr_deriv ((hasDerivAt_id t).sub_const 1 |>.mul (hasDerivAt_exp t))
    ring
  · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
    continuity

rw [integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt (f := fun t ↦ (t - 1) * exp t)]
  · simp
  · intro t _
    convert HasDerivAt.mul (HasDerivAt.sub_const (hasDerivAt_id _) _) (hasDerivAt_exp _) using 1
    ring
  · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
    continuity

rw [← integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt (f := fun t ↦ (t - 1) * exp t)]
  · simp
  · intro t _
    convert ((hasDerivAt_id t).sub_const 1).mul (hasDerivAt_exp t) using 1
    ring
  · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
    continuity

have h : ∀ t, HasDerivAt (fun t ↦ (t - 1) * exp t + 1) (t * exp t) t := by
    intro t
    apply HasDerivAt.add_const
    convert ((hasDerivAt_id t).sub_const 1).mul (hasDerivAt_exp t) using 1
    ring
  rw [integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt (fun t _ ↦ h t)]
  · simp
  · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
    exact continuous_id.mul continuous_exp

rw [integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt (F := fun t ↦ (t - 1) * exp t)]
  · simp
  · intro t _
    apply HasDerivAt.congr_deriv (((hasDerivAt_id t).sub_const 1).mul (hasDerivAt_exp t))
    ring
  · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
    continuity

rw [integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt (F := fun t ↦ (t - 1) * exp t)]
  · simp
  · intro t _
    convert ((hasDerivAt_id t).sub_const 1).mul (hasDerivAt_exp t) using 1
    ring
  · exact (continuous_id.mul continuous_exp).intervalIntegrable 0 x

rw [integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt (fun t _ ↦ _) (continuous_id.mul continuous_exp).intervalIntegrable]
  · apply HasDerivAt.mul
    · apply HasDerivAt.sub_const
      apply hasDerivAt_id
    · apply hasDerivAt_exp
    · ring
  · simp

rw [integral_mul_exp]
  simp

have h (t : ℝ) : HasDerivAt (fun t ↦ (t - 1) * exp t) (t * exp t) t := by
    apply HasDerivAt.congr_deriv (HasDerivAt.mul (HasDerivAt.sub_const (hasDerivAt_id t) 1) (hasDerivAt_exp t))
    ring
  rw [integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt (fun t _ ↦ h t)]
  · simp
  · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
    continuity

rw [integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt (fun t _ ↦
    by convert ((hasDerivAt_id t).sub_const 1).mul (hasDerivAt_exp t) using 1; ring)
    (by apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable; continuity)]
  simp

rw [integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt (F := fun t ↦ (t - 1) * exp t)]
  · simp
  · intro t _
    apply HasDerivAt.congr_deriv
    · apply HasDerivAt.mul
      · apply HasDerivAt.sub_const
        apply hasDerivAt_id
      · apply hasDerivAt_exp
    · ring
  · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
    exact continuous_id.mul continuous_exp

have h : ∀ t ∈ uIcc 0 x, HasDerivAt (fun t ↦ (t - 1) * exp t) (t * exp t) t := by
    intro t _
    convert ((hasDerivAt_id t).sub_const 1).mul (hasDerivAt_exp t) using 1
    ring
  rw [integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt h ((continuous_id.mul continuous_exp).intervalIntegrable _ _)]
  simp

rw [integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt (f := fun t ↦ (t - 1) * exp t)]
  · simp
  · intro t _
    apply HasDerivAt.mul
    · apply HasDerivAt.sub_const
      apply hasDerivAt_id
    · apply hasDerivAt_exp
    · ring
  · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
    continuity

rw [integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt (F := fun t ↦ (t - 1) * exp t + 1)]
  · simp
  · intro t _
    apply HasDerivAt.add_const
    convert ((hasDerivAt_id t).sub_const 1).mul (hasDerivAt_exp t) using 1
    ring
  · exact (continuous_id.mul continuous_exp).continuousOn

rw [integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt (f := fun t ↦ (t - 1) * exp t)]
  · simp
  · intro t _
    apply HasDerivAt.congr_deriv (HasDerivAt.mul (HasDerivAt.sub_const (hasDerivAt_id t) 1) (hasDerivAt_exp t))
    ring
  · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
    exact Continuous.mul continuous_id continuous_exp

rw [intervalIntegral.integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt (F := fun t ↦ (t - 1) * exp t)]
  · simp
  · intro t _
    apply HasDerivAt.congr_deriv (((hasDerivAt_id t).sub_const 1).mul (hasDerivAt_exp t))
    simp [sub_mul]
  · exact (continuous_id.mul continuous_exp).continuousOn

rw [integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt (fun t _ ↦ ((hasDerivAt_id t).sub_const 1).mul (hasDerivAt_exp t) |>.congr_deriv (by ring))]
  · simp
  · exact (continuous_id.mul continuous_exp).intervalIntegrable _ _

rw [integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt (F := fun t => (t - 1) * exp t)]
  · simp
  · intro t _
    convert ((hasDerivAt_id t).sub_const 1).mul (hasDerivAt_exp t) using 1
    ring
  · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
    continuity

rw [integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt (fun t => (t - 1) * exp t)]
  · simp
  · intro t _
    convert ((hasDerivAt_id t).sub_const 1).mul (hasDerivAt_exp t) using 1
    ring
  · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
    exact continuous_id.mul continuous_exp

have h : ∀ t, HasDerivAt (fun t ↦ (t - 1) * exp t) (t * exp t) t := by
    intro t
    apply HasDerivAt.congr_deriv (((hasDerivAt_id t).sub_const 1).mul (hasDerivAt_exp t))
    ring
  rw [integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt (fun t _ ↦ h t)]
  · simp
  · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
    continuity

rw [integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt (fun t _ ↦
    ((hasDerivAt_id t).sub_const 1).mul (hasDerivAt_exp t) |>.congr_deriv (by ring))]
  · simp
  · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
    continuity

rw [integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt (F := fun t ↦ (t - 1) * exp t)]
  · simp
  · intro t _
    convert HasDerivAt.mul (HasDerivAt.sub_const (hasDerivAt_id t) 1) (Real.hasDerivAt_exp t) using 1
    ring
  · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
    exact continuous_id.mul continuous_exp

rw [integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt (f := fun t ↦ (t - 1) * exp t)]
  · simp
  · intro t _
    apply HasDerivAt.congr_deriv
    · apply HasDerivAt.mul
      · apply HasDerivAt.sub_const (hasDerivAt_id t) 1
      · apply hasDerivAt_exp t
    · ring
  · exact (continuous_id.mul continuous_exp).intervalIntegrable 0 x

rw [integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt (F := fun t ↦ (t - 1) * exp t)]
  · simp
  · intro t _
    apply HasDerivAt.mul
    · exact (hasDerivAt_id t).sub_const 1
    · exact hasDerivAt_exp t
    · simp; ring
  · exact (continuous_id.mul continuous_exp).intervalIntegrable 0 x

rw [integral_mul_deriv_eq_deriv_mul (u := fun t ↦ t) (v := exp) (u' := fun _ ↦ 1)]
  · simp [integral_exp]
    ring
  · intros; apply hasDerivAt_id
  · intros; apply hasDerivAt_exp
  · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable; exact continuous_const
  · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable; exact continuous_exp
successful_attempts:
rw [integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt (f := fun t ↦ (t - 1) * exp t)]
  · simp
  · intro t _
    apply HasDerivAt.congr_deriv
    · apply HasDerivAt.mul
      · apply HasDerivAt.sub_const
        exact hasDerivAt_id t
      · exact hasDerivAt_exp t
    · ring
  · exact (continuous_id.mul continuous_exp).intervalIntegrable 0 x

have h : ∀ t, HasDerivAt (fun t => (t - 1) * exp t) (t * exp t) t := by
    intro t
    rw [show t * exp t = 1 * exp t + (t - 1) * exp t by ring]
    exact ((hasDerivAt_id t).sub_const 1).mul (hasDerivAt_exp t)
  rw [integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt (fun t _ => h t)]
  · simp
  · exact (continuous_id.mul continuous_exp).intervalIntegrable 0 x

rw [integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt (f := fun t ↦ (t - 1) * exp t)]
  · simp
  · intro t _
    rw [show t * exp t = 1 * exp t + (t - 1) * exp t by ring]
    exact ((hasDerivAt_id t).sub_const 1).mul (hasDerivAt_exp t)
  · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
    exact continuous_id.mul continuous_exp
